title: Course Schedule II
input_format: An integer `numCourses` and an array of prerequisites.
output_format: The ordering of courses you should take to finish all courses. If there is no valid ordering, return an empty array.
constraints:
- `1 <= numCourses <= 2000`
- `0 <= prerequisites.length <= numCourses * (numCourses - 1)`
- `prerequisites[i].length == 2`
- `0 <= ai, bi < numCourses`
- `ai != bi`
- All the pairs `[ai, bi]` are **distinct**.
function_signature: function findOrder(numCourses: number, prerequisites: number[][]): number[] {}
